import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let haystack = io.read_line()
  let needle = io.read_line()
  match haystack
  when Some(h)
    match needle
    when Some(n)
      if string.contains(h, n)
        print("YES")
      else
        print("NO")
      end
    when None
      print("NO")
    end
  when None
    print("NO")
  end
end
